_meta.source: meesell-data-engineer hand-curation, founder-approved tone. Tier A (universal core) + Tier B (onboarding extensions) per docs/MVP_ARCHITECTURE.md §5.6.6.
principles: Indian / Tirupur context examples (kurti, saree, jeera, Tirupur pincodes)
Friendly but direct — like a Tirupur shopkeeper, not a customer-service script
One concrete example per help text

tiers.A: Universal core — 28 fields appearing in ≥99% of corpus leaves
tiers.B: Onboarding compliance extensions — ~10 fields, conditional by super-category

display_help.en: What customers see in search. Make it specific — say 'Blue cotton kurti with mirror work' instead of just 'Kurti'.

display_placeholder.en: Blue cotton kurti with mirror work

validation_message.en: Please give your product a name.

display_help.en: Which version of this product is this? For a kurti, pick the size (S, M, L, XL). For a saree, pick the style. One product row = one variant.

validation_message.en: Please pick the variant from the list.

display_help.en: Set in rupees. This is the price shown to buyers on Meesho. Example: 499.

validation_message.en: Please enter your selling price in rupees.

display_help.en: The maximum retail price printed on the tag. Must be higher than your selling price. Example: 999.

validation_message.en: Please enter the MRP in rupees.

display_help.en: How many pieces of this variant do you have ready to ship? Example: 50.

validation_message.en: Please enter your stock count.

display_help.en: Where the product was made. Usually India for Tirupur sellers.

validation_message.en: Please pick where the product was made.

display_help.en: The main photo customers see in search. Plain white background. At least 1500×1500 pixels. JPEG format. No watermark or shop logo.

validation_message.en: Please add the main product photo.

display_help.en: A second angle. Side view or back. Same white background. Same size and format as the main photo.
A third angle. Close-up of fabric, embroidery, or detail. Same white background.
One more photo if you have it. Lifestyle shot is OK here — model wearing it, flat lay, or full view.
If you have your own brand, type it here. Example: 'Tirupur Cotton Co.' Leave blank if you don't have one.
An internal Meesho code used to group related variants. Most sellers can leave this blank.
Your internal product code, if you use one. Helps you track inventory. Example: KRT-BLU-M.
Another internal code if you have one. Used when you have many similar styles. Leave blank if you don't.
Tell customers more about the product. Material, fit, care instructions. Keep it short — 2 to 3 sentences.

display_placeholder.en: Soft cotton fabric. Regular fit. Machine wash cold. Iron at low heat.

display_help.en: Who made the product. If you made it yourself, put your business name. Required by Indian law (Legal Metrology Act).

validation_message.en: Please enter the manufacturer name.

display_help.en: Full address where the product is made. Street, area, city, state. Required by Indian law.

validation_message.en: Please enter the manufacturer address.

display_help.en: The 6-digit pincode where the product is made. Example: 641604 (Tirupur).

validation_message.en: Please enter a 6-digit pincode.

display_help.en: Who packs the product for shipping. Usually the same as the manufacturer.

validation_message.en: Please enter the packer name.

display_help.en: Address where the product is packed. Usually the same as the manufacturer address.

validation_message.en: Please enter the packer address.

display_help.en: 6-digit pincode where the product is packed.

validation_message.en: Please enter a 6-digit pincode.

display_help.en: Who imported the product. If the product is made in India, type 'Not Applicable'.

validation_message.en: Please enter the importer name.

display_help.en: Importer's full address. If made in India, type 'Not Applicable'.

validation_message.en: Please enter the importer address.

display_help.en: Importer's pincode. If made in India, type '000000'.

validation_message.en: Please enter a 6-digit pincode (or 000000 if made in India).

display_help.en: How much does ONE piece weigh, in grams? Example: a kurti is about 250g, a saree is about 700g.

validation_message.en: Please enter the weight per piece in grams.

display_help.en: Pick the standard product type from the list. Example: Kurti, Saree, Mobile Cover. This helps customers find your product.

validation_message.en: Please pick the category type.

display_help.en: How much to refund if the customer returns it damaged. Usually the same as your selling price. Leave blank for default.
How many pieces are inside ONE pack? Example: 1 kurti per pack, 6 pairs of socks per pack.

validation_message.en: Please enter how many pieces are in one pack.

display_help.en: Pick from the list of brands. Start typing the brand name to search. If your brand isn't there, click 'Request to add'.

fields._TIER_B_ONBOARDING_EXTENSIONS: —— 9 fields, asked conditionally based on declared super-categories ——

display_help.en: Your 14-digit FSSAI food license number. Required by law to sell food on Meesho. Don't have one yet? Apply at fssai.gov.in (it takes about 7 days).

validation_message.en: Please enter your 14-digit FSSAI license number.

display_help.en: When your FSSAI license expires. We'll remind you a month before.

validation_message.en: Please enter your FSSAI expiry date.

display_help.en: If your product has BIS or ISI safety certification, add the number here. It boosts customer trust and search ranking.
Required for wireless devices like Bluetooth headphones or speakers. The R-number from your WPC certification.
The Indian Standard number for your product. Example: IS-616 for power tools.
If your product is under BIS compulsory marking scheme, add the CM/L number here.
For cosmetics, supplements, or licensed products. Your CDSCO, AYUSH, or state-board license number.

validation_message.en: Please enter your license number.

display_help.en: Pick the kind of license you have. Example: AYUSH for ayurvedic products, CDSCO for cosmetics.

validation_message.en: Please pick your license type.

display_help.en: When your license expires. We'll remind you a month before.

validation_message.en: Please enter your license expiry date.

display_help.en: The 13-digit ISBN from the back cover of the book. Optional, but helps customers trust your listing.
